role_focus_note: Highlights indices emphasized for your role
landing_hero: Read the sky before the rain
landing_sub: VertiAI analyzes the vertical structure of the atmosphere with MetPy and rule-based AI to support rainmaking operations and rain forecasting.
feat1_d: Skew-T Log-P + Hodograph computed by MetPy, scientifically correct, with automatic inversion-layer highlighting.
feat2_d: Explains its reasoning rather than acting as a black box, with regional rainmaking criteria.
feat3_d: Tune thresholds per region (NE / East / South) and switch KPI focus by user role.
mission_text: Support rainmaking operational decisions with accurate vertical atmospheric data, reduce drought risk, and replenish reservoirs with sound reasoning.
upload_hint: Accepts HTML/text-list files from TMD or Wyoming
history_hint: Select station and year (B.E. 2563-2567 or A.D. 2020-2024 supported)
role_section_hint: Each role emphasizes different KPIs on the dashboard
role_pilot_d: Focus on freezing level, cloud base (LCL/LFC), cloud top (EL)
role_meteorologist_d: Full stability indices: CAPE, CIN, LI, K-Index, PWAT
role_researcher_d: See every index for research work
role_farmer_d: Simple summary focused on rain chance (CAPE, PWAT, K-Index)
threshold_hint: Tune per-region criteria for localized rainmaking assessment; saved to database
empty_hint: Select a station, date, and time, then press "Analyze" to view results
err_select: Please select a station and date
err_connect: Cannot reach the server. Check your connection and try again
err_fetch: Could not fetch Wyoming data (blocked or not yet available for this run). Try another date/time, or upload a data file manually
err_no_data: No usable data found for this time period
err_load: Failed to load data. Please try again
